resources.string: Select a Godot project with Android’s folder picker, or grant optional all-files access and enter its direct path. The installer verifies project.godot and writes only inside the selected project.
Optional mode for direct paths in shared storage. Android still blocks other apps’ private Android/data directories.
Full storage access is not enabled.
Enable “Allow access to manage all files” in Android settings, then return to the installer.
Enter the absolute path of the folder that directly contains project.godot.
No root access · Full access is optional and user-controlled · Writes stay inside the selected project · No API keys bundled
Choose a Godot project folder to begin.
Valid Godot project found. Ready to install.
Valid Godot project found. The addon already exists; reinstalling will create a backup first.
The selected location is not an accessible folder.
The path is invalid. Enter an absolute folder path.
Full storage access is required for a direct path. Enable it in Android settings.
project.godot was not found directly inside the selected folder.
The selected folder is read-only. Choose a writable project folder.
A file named addons blocks installation. Rename it manually, then recheck.
A file named addons/godotforge_ai blocks installation. Rename it manually; the installer will not delete it.
Folder access was revoked or Android blocks this location.
Android did not grant persistent read/write access to this folder.
Addon installed successfully. Enable it in Godot under Project Settings > Plugins.
Addon reinstalled successfully. Backup created at addons/%1$s.
Reinstallation requires confirmation because an existing addon will be overwritten after backup.
The installer will first copy the existing addons/godotforge_ai folder to a timestamped backup inside addons, then overwrite the managed addon files. Extra files are not deleted.
